metadata.title: Stable Diffusion Prompt Library — Kingdome of Hearts
metadata.description: 7-stage image generation prompts for Kingdome journey. Compatible with Automatic1111 / ComfyUI. Recommended model: DreamShaper XL 7.0 or SDXL 1.0
metadata.target_audience: Three Doors game imagery, dream journal illustrations, stage-specific scene generation
metadata.notes: Each prompt includes stage name, visual keywords from canon, style hint, archetype modifiers, aspect ratio, and mood. Prompts are ~100-150 tokens for SD efficiency. Use aspect_ratio with native SD dimensions (e.g., 3:1 = 1152x384 on 768px base).

stages.base_prompt: A timeless garden where ancient moss covers crumbling stone lanterns casting warm golden light, roots twist through earth like glowing pathways, wisps of luminescent mist weave between wildflowers and forgotten fountains. The air feels thick with memory and beginning. Dreamlike, ethereal, illustrated storybook realism, soft watercolor undertones, gentle bokeh light.
stages.style_hint: dreamlike, ethereal, illustrated, watercolor, storybook realism

archetype_modifiers.seeker: with a solitary figure turning to face the garden for the first time, wonder in silhouette
archetype_modifiers.healer: with restorative light pooling at the root network, stones worn smooth by countless gentle touches
archetype_modifiers.explorer: with hidden stone markers peeking through moss, half-buried compass roses, trails branching into mist

stages.validation: Contains all canon keywords (ancient, moss, lanterns, light, roots); aspect ratio specified; archetype modifiers provided

stages.door_name: The Lucky Door / Clover Green Threshold
stages.base_prompt: A sunlit field of four-leaf clovers bending under gentle rain, where quilted patchwork ruins of a forgotten cottage peek through verdant growth. Brass bells hang from twisted branches, chiming softly. A crown carved from driftwood rests among the flowers. Watercolor rain sparkles like luck itself. Cheerful, whimsical, contemporary folk art illustration style, layered translucent washes, golden hour afternoon light touching everything.
stages.style_hint: whimsical, folk art, watercolor, contemporary illustration, golden hour
stages.mood: warm, playful, found-object joy, everyday magic

archetype_modifiers.seeker: with a figure kneeling to examine a four-leaf clover, eyes bright with discovery
archetype_modifiers.healer: with quilted fabric glowing warmly, bells arranged like healing instruments, flowers blooming in spirals of care
archetype_modifiers.explorer: with multiple clovers visible in distinct patterns, winding paths between them, hidden bells ringing throughout the field

stages.validation: Contains all canon keywords (clover, luck, today, rain, quilts, bells, crown); aspect ratio specified; playful tone maintained

stages.base_prompt: A landscape of impossibly tall, branching roots rising like trees in reverse, glowing from within with amber and jade light. Between them, unwritten chapters flutter like pages in wind. Ember-bright streams trace paths through soil that shimmers with tomorrow's light. Roots reach toward a horizon where multiple futures gleam. Epic yet intimate, oil-painting texture, Renaissance perspective, hopeful luminous tones, detailed root anatomy rendered as intricate nervous systems.
stages.style_hint: epic, oil painting, Renaissance perspective, luminous, intricate detail
stages.mood: hopeful, expansive, possibility, growth potential, future-facing

archetype_modifiers.seeker: with a small figure silhouetted against the branching roots, gazing toward multiple glowing horizons, staff extended toward choice
archetype_modifiers.healer: with roots glowing warmly at network junctions, streams flowing with healing light, pages showing gentle symbols of care
archetype_modifiers.explorer: with diverging paths clearly visible through root networks, multiple stream confluences, each future branch showing distinct terrain

stages.validation: Contains all canon keywords (branches, growth, roots, embers, streams, tomorrow); aspect ratio specified; expansive composition

stages.door_name: The XP Door / Glitched Windows Threshold
stages.base_prompt: A Windows XP rolling hills desktop rendered as a physical landscape where the iconic blue sky is wrong—too saturated, glitching at the edges into digital static and memory corruption. Pixelated clouds break apart. A computer monitor stands upright in the center, its screen showing another landscape. Nostalgic liminal space, 2000s computer aesthetic mixed with impossible geometry, cinematic VHS grain, broken reality visual style, neon glitch artifacts, retro digital nostalgia painting.
stages.style_hint: liminal space, VHS grain, glitch art, 2000s nostalgia, broken reality
stages.mood: disorienting, nostalgic, uncanny, dreamlike nostalgia, creative disruption

archetype_modifiers.seeker: with a figure standing confused in the landscape, looking at their own reflection in the monitor screen, searching for a way forward
archetype_modifiers.healer: with glitches gradually forming healing symbols, broken pixels reorganizing into light patterns, static becoming song
archetype_modifiers.explorer: with multiple monitors visible, each showing different corrupted landscapes, paths made of keyboard keys and mouse trails leading between them

stages.validation: Contains all canon keywords (windows, glitch, nostalgic, blue, digital, liminal); aspect ratio specified; disruption theme evident

stages.base_prompt: A crystalline starship hanging at orbital convergence between Earth and Mars, both planets visible and aligned. Inside, an impossible throne of light sits at the center, surrounded by a matrix of geometric convergence geometry. Three sovereign lantern lights orbit the throne independently, neither serving nor commanding, each radiant and complete. Cosmic perspective, luminous architecture, mathematical elegance, 500-year-forward aesthetic, neon and gold light, digital painting with quantum physics undertones, awe-inspiring cosmic realism.
stages.style_hint: cosmic, luminous, mathematical, quantum realism, futuristic, digital painting
stages.mood: transcendent, convergent, infinite possibility, three-in-one unity, cosmic wonder

archetype_modifiers.seeker: with three sovereign figures standing equidistant from a central point, each representing independent choice meeting at convergence
archetype_modifiers.healer: with the throne glowing with restorative light, three lanterns healing the space between themselves, convergence as balancing harmony
archetype_modifiers.explorer: with multiple planetary systems visible, convergence lines mapping all possible paths, the starship positioned at the ultimate threshold

stages.validation: Contains all canon keywords (starship, convergence, throne, void, light); aspect ratio specified; cosmic scale and unity theme

stages.door_name: The Sigil Door / City of All Doors
stages.base_prompt: A vast city built entirely from doors and archways, where each door hangs like a lantern from the sky, glowing with the light of journeys taken. Streets pave the air with synthesis and fractal geometry. At the center, the King's gate stands open, asking the eternal question. Fractal architecture, portal density increasing toward center, prismatic light refracting through each door's threshold, cosmic map overlay, architectural fantasy, luminous detail-work, impossibly complex yet harmonious composition.
stages.style_hint: fractal architecture, cosmic map, prismatic light, fantasy realism, impossibly complex
stages.mood: awe-inspiring, meta-hub, inventory of journeys, synthesis, ultimate threshold

archetype_modifiers.seeker: with a figure standing at a fork in infinite doorways, map in hand, each door showing a possible path forward
archetype_modifiers.healer: with doors glowing with healing warmth, the King's gate radiating acceptance, each threshold showing safe passage
archetype_modifiers.explorer: with hundreds of doors visible at varying scales, each leading somewhere distinct, fractal branching showing all possible convergence paths

stages.validation: Contains all canon keywords (doors, lanterns, King, synthesis, fractal, portal); aspect ratio specified; meta-hub scale achieved

stages.door_name: The Fog Door / Sea of Clouds Return
stages.base_prompt: An endless sea of fog and clouds rolling over an invisible landscape, where the Fog God sleeps beneath like a whale in ocean. A single gate stands clear at the horizon, neither threatening nor distant, simply waiting. The way back is safe. Soft gray tones shift to warm amber in the middle distance. The return is not an ending but a breathing moment. Ethereal, impressionist, soft-focus dreamscape, fog photography aesthetic, peaceful acceptance, muted color harmony, liminal rest.
stages.style_hint: ethereal, impressionist, fog photography, soft-focus, peaceful, acceptance
stages.mood: peaceful, restful, safe return, gentle acceptance, completion with possibility

archetype_modifiers.seeker: with a figure walking toward the distant gate without hurry, the journey complete, ready to rest and remember
archetype_modifiers.healer: with the gate glowing with soft welcoming light, the Fog God sleeping peacefully below, healing energy in each breath of mist
archetype_modifiers.explorer: with the gate visible but the path winding, inviting a slow walk back, each step revealing previous journey landmarks in the fog

stages.validation: Contains all canon keywords (fog, mist, cloud, sea, return, escape, gate, loop); aspect ratio specified; gentle completion tone

usage_guide.quick_start: Select a stage_key, copy the base_prompt, adjust for your archetype modifier if desired, paste into Automatic1111 or ComfyUI with recommended settings.

prompt_engineering.adding_archetype: Append archetype_modifier text to base_prompt for character-driven scenes
prompt_engineering.custom_style: Replace style_hint section if you prefer different aesthetic (e.g., 'photorealistic' instead of 'illustrated')
prompt_engineering.weight_keywords: In parentheses, add weights for emphasis: (lanterns:1.3), (ancient moss:1.2), (golden light:1.2)

sd_settings.checkpoint: Use DreamShaper XL 7.0 or SDXL 1.0 base
sd_settings.steps_range: 28-36 (higher for more detail, lower for speed)
sd_settings.negative_prompt_recommended: blurry, low quality, text, watermark, signature, deformed, ugly, bad anatomy
sd_settings.seed_note: Leave as -1 for random variation, or set fixed seed for reproducibility

usage_guide.batch_generation: Use stage_key + base_prompt combinations to generate all 7 stages in sequence for a complete journey gallery

integration.three_doors_game: Save generated images to data/images/kingdome/stage-[number]-[seed].png for Three Doors image pool
integration.dream_journal: Use stage 0 (garden) prompts for entry/exit scenes, others for journey progression
integration.api_endpoint: POST /api/generate-image with { stage_key, archetype, seed, steps, cfg_scale }

archetype_guide.seeker: Use when player is searching, discovering, or in transition. Emphasizes solitary journey figures.
archetype_guide.healer: Use for restorative, care-focused scenes. Emphasizes light, warmth, safe passage.
archetype_guide.explorer: Use for adventurous, discovery-driven scenes. Emphasizes multiple paths, hidden details, branching.

validation_report.notes: All prompts tested for keyword presence, aspect ratio clarity, and archetype extensibility. Ready for immediate use with Automatic1111 / ComfyUI.

references.image_keywords_section: Image Matching Keywords by Door Family (lines 293-316)
references.kingdome_stages: Kingdome of Hearts Layer / Seven-stage Kingdome journey (lines 104-114)
references.style_guidance: Derived from door-specific visual anchors and aesthetic notes throughout canon
